summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Exchange Adapter Layer PHASE 5.1. Successfully tested 27 API endpoints with 26/27 tests passing (96.3% success rate). The module provides unified interface for BINANCE, BYBIT, OKX exchanges with connection management, account operations, order management, market data, and WebSocket streams. All core functionality working correctly including end-to-end trading workflow.

minor_issues.impact: BYBIT exchange unavailable, but BINANCE and OKX working

passed_tests: GET /api/exchange/health - returns healthy status, version phase_5.1, 3 supported exchanges
GET /api/exchange/status - router status with registered exchanges and connections
POST /api/exchange/connect - successfully connects BINANCE and OKX testnet
POST /api/exchange/disconnect - successfully disconnects from exchange
GET /api/exchange/status?exchange=X - exchange-specific status for BINANCE/OKX
GET /api/exchange/balances - retrieves balances from 3 exchanges, 6 total assets
GET /api/exchange/positions - retrieves positions from connected exchanges
GET /api/exchange/open-orders - retrieves open orders from all exchanges
POST /api/exchange/create-order - creates market orders (BTCUSDT BUY)
POST /api/exchange/create-order - creates limit orders (ETHUSDT SELL @ $3500)
POST /api/exchange/cancel-order - successfully cancels orders
GET /api/exchange/ticker/BTCUSDT - retrieves BINANCE ticker @ $69,471.6
GET /api/exchange/orderbook/BTCUSDT - retrieves orderbook with 10 bids/asks
GET /api/exchange/best-price/BTCUSDT - finds best price across exchanges
POST /api/exchange/stream/start - starts ticker and orderbook WebSocket streams
POST /api/exchange/stream/stop - stops WebSocket streams
GET /api/exchange/stream/status - retrieves stream status and active connections
GET /api/exchange/history/orders - retrieves order history (5 orders found)
GET /api/exchange/stats/orders - retrieves order statistics for 7-day period
Error handling - properly returns 400 for unknown exchange and invalid order sides
Full trading workflow - complete 5-step end-to-end trading process successful
action_item_for_main_agent: Investigate BYBIT adapter 403 connection error - may need API key configuration or endpoint URL correction for testnet access
